name: Trolddom
short_description: An old-school 2D fantasy open world MMORPG featuring character progression, classes, monsters, quests, guilds, dungeons, epic loot, achievements, procedural world generation, player-versus-player combat, and much more.
detailed_description:
Version 1.0 finally live!

  • Old-school 2D fantasy open world MMORPG - all the basic stuff you'd expect, monsters, loot, player trading, auction houses, achievements, guilds, professions, and so on.

  • 5 classes - play as a fighter, a priest, a sorcerer, a paladin, or a witch, each with 3 unique talent trees and 150+ talents in total.

  • 350+ quests - you can reach maximum levels by doing quests, solo or in a party.

  • 8 instance dungeons - bring friends to tackle these challenges for unique rare loot.

  • Optional PVP - don't worry, you won't be ganked.

  • No pay-to-win (ever!) - the price of the game is what you see on the tin.

  • Mix of handcrafted and generated worlds and dungeons - every day Junjun the Portal Master will open up a gateway to another world that has never been visited before.

  • Gods and deities - discover new deities, show your allegiance to them and they'll reward you.

  • Optional offline mode and custom servers - play locally without internet connection or run your own servers.
